faqs.question: What is the SpaceWing Astronaut Society?
faqs.answer: The SpaceWing Astronaut Society is our exclusive membership program for everyone who has flown with us. Membership is automatic upon completion of your first mission and includes: lifetime 5% discount on future flights, members-only communications, exclusive merchandise, access to member events, digital badge and certificate, and entry into our astronaut community. Membership never expires.

faqs.question: What are the membership tiers?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing offers five tiers: Space Cadet (registered, not yet flown), Astronaut (1 mission completed), Veteran Astronaut (2-3 missions), Elite Commander (4-5 missions), and Captain's Circle (6+ missions). Each tier offers progressively better benefits including larger discounts, priority booking, exclusive mission access, and complimentary upgrades.

faqs.question: What benefits does Captain's Circle offer?
faqs.answer: Captain's Circle is our most exclusive tier for those with 6+ SpaceWing missions. Benefits include: 10% lifetime discount, first access to new missions and destinations, complimentary cabin upgrades when available, dedicated VIP concierge, annual Captain's Dinner with company leadership, input on future programs, and exclusive Captain's Circle lounge access at all facilities.

faqs.question: How does the referral program work?
faqs.answer: Our StarReferral program rewards you for introducing others to space travel. For each person you refer who completes a booking, you receive $25,000 in flight credit. Refer three people and receive $100,000 credit plus a complimentary cabin upgrade. Top referrers annually receive a free suborbital flight. There's no limit to referrals—many members have earned free flights!

faqs.question: Can I transfer my membership benefits?
faqs.answer: Membership benefits are personal and non-transferable. However, Captain's Circle members can extend a one-time 5% discount to one family member per year. Membership itself cannot be transferred, but we offer corporate memberships where companies can share benefits among employees.

faqs.question: Are there member-only events?
faqs.answer: Yes! SpaceWing Astronaut Society members receive invitations to exclusive events including: annual SpaceWing Summit (astronaut reunion and new mission announcements), VIP launch viewing events, astronaut meet-and-greets, behind-the-scenes facility tours, and educational seminars on space topics. Events are held worldwide throughout the year.

faqs.question: What is the Founders Program?
faqs.answer: The First 100 Founders Program is our most exclusive membership tier, available only to our first 100 customers. Founders receive permanent 10% discount, exclusive Founders-only mission opportunities, name on the Founders Monument at headquarters, lifetime VIP concierge service, and input on company direction. Only 17 spots remain at $50,000 deposit.

faqs.question: Do membership points expire?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing uses flight credits, not points. Credits never expire and can be used toward any SpaceWing product or service. Credits are earned through referrals, promotions, and tier benefits. They can also be gifted to family members once per calendar year.

faqs.question: Can my family join my membership?
faqs.answer: Family members who fly with you automatically become members themselves. For those who haven't flown, we offer Family Companion passes that allow access to member events and viewing experiences. Captain's Circle members can add up to three family members to their household membership with select benefits.

faqs.question: How do I track my membership status?
faqs.answer: Your personalized member portal at members.spacewing.com shows your tier status, flight credits, referral progress, upcoming events, and exclusive offers. Our mobile app provides real-time updates and allows you to book using credits. You'll also receive monthly email newsletters with member news and opportunities.
